creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to george from comment #2)

At the outset: Thank you for the quick approval you gave me in comment #1 and no worries, the "maintainer approval" flag for the attached patch can be set via:

> Attachment -> Details -> maintainer-approval [+]

I have already put the patch into my build queue and will commit it in the next few days.
